/**
 * Typed fetch wrappers around the FastAPI backend.
 *
 * Every endpoint returns either the successful response body OR throws an
 * ``ApiError`` — the hooks use that contract to derive their loading/error
 * state. We deliberately do not use axios; native fetch is sufficient here.
 */const BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL||'';export class ApiError extends Error{constructor(status,type,message){super(message);this.status=void 0;this.type=void 0;this.status=status;this.type=type;}}async function post(path,body){const res=await fetch("".concat(BASE_URL).concat(path),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});if(!res.ok){var _payload;let payload=null;try{payload=await res.json();}catch(_unused){/* body may be empty */}const err=(_payload=payload)===null||_payload===void 0?void 0:_payload.error;throw new ApiError(res.status,(err===null||err===void 0?void 0:err.type)||'network_error',(err===null||err===void 0?void 0:err.message)||"Request failed (".concat(res.status,")."));}return await res.json();}async function get(path){const res=await fetch("".concat(BASE_URL).concat(path));if(!res.ok){throw new ApiError(res.status,'network_error',"Request failed (".concat(res.status,")."));}return await res.json();}export const api={listModels:()=>get('/api/models'),explain:payload=>post('/api/explain',payload),quiz:payload=>post('/api/quiz',payload),chat:payload=>post('/api/chat',payload)};
